caption: A man is seated in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall and clothing racks in the background. He wears a green t-shirt with the white text "I CAN NEVER" and "SMILE" printed on the front, a green baseball cap, and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. To his right, a white mannequin wears a white t-shirt. Red and white logos are overlaid on the screen, including one that reads "REALLY". As the sequence progresses, the man remains seated and focused, speaking while looking slightly to his left. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing to form words. The background environment and equipment remain static throughout the scene.
